---
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs

website:
  title: "TdF Tippspiel"
  date: today 
  format: 
   html:
    self-contained: true 
    toc: true 
    toc-title: Inhalt
    toc-location: left 
    theme: 
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
    fontsize: 32 px 
    font-family: Roboto
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 300px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 300px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    code-tools: 
     source: true
     toggle: false
     caption: This is my code
lang: de
execute: 
  echo: fenced
  warning: false
  messages: false
  error: true
code-fold: false
code-summary: Hier siehst du den Code... 
---

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| include: false

# Download libraries

# library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(writexl)
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

```

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| include: false

total = read_excel("tdf_tippspiel_master.xlsx", sheet = "Auswertung Gesamt")
stage = read_excel("tdf_tippspiel_master.xlsx", sheet = "Auswertung Stage")
teams = read_excel("tdf_tippspiel_master.xlsx", sheet = "Spieler_Teams")
startlist = read_excel("tdf_tippspiel_master.xlsx", sheet = "Startlist2026")
spieler_liste <-sort(unique(teams$Spieler))
```

## Tour de France 2026 Tipico für Arme

Moing!

have Fun in the sun.

::: callout-important
Punktestand aktuell nach `r ncol(stage)-1` von 21 Etappen.
:::

### Gesamtstand

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| include: true

datatable(total,
          options=list(
            pageLength=17,
            order = list(list(2, "desc"))
          )
          )
```

## Punkte pro Etappe

Übersicht über die Punkte pro Etappe.

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| include: true


datatable(stage,
          options=list(
            pageLength=17
          )
          )
```

## Fahrer eurer Teams

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| include: true

datatable(teams,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 16
)
)
```

## Wer kann was?

Einfach mal checken welcher Fahrer wann wie viele Punkte geholt hat.

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| include: true

datatable(startlist,
          options=list(
            pageLength=8)
          )
```
